goal: code-smell-sweep-2-9be8: Second sweep on merged main — review remaining smells from CODE-SMELL-AUDIT-R2 and fix them; every role uses composer-2.5. Read discovery + bootstrap under `.orchestrate/code-smell-sweep-2-9be8/`. Respect AGENTS.md.
summary: Round-2 smell fixes: microcopyString helper, agent-chat resume errors, useAgent thread-id extract, aiChatDrawer module splits, SW logging, BE tool constants + board-brief helper — then merge.
acceptanceCriteria: Each worker fixes its scoped smell with tests; eslint + tsc green on touched slices.
Verifiers record unit-test-verified or a concrete blocker.
Merge branch passes full Jest, tsc, eslint, vite build, and scoped backend pytest.

tasks.name: microcopy-string-helper
tasks.scopedGoal: Add microcopyString() and remove `as string` casts in aiChatDrawer and useAgent.
tasks.brief:
Read CODE-SMELL-AUDIT-R2 id microcopy-as-string.

1. In `src/constants/microcopy.ts`, export `microcopyString(value: unknown): string` that returns `typeof value === 'string' ? value : String(value ?? '')` (or stricter: throw in dev if not string).
2. Replace `(microcopy… as string)` in `src/components/aiChatDrawer/index.tsx` with `microcopyString(microcopy…)` for template `.replace`, aria labels, announcements.
3. Fix the one cast in `src/utils/hooks/useAgent.ts` (`toolRoundExhausted`).
4. Add `microcopy.test.ts` or extend existing i18n tests for the helper.

Do not change locale files unless a key is genuinely missing.
acceptance: No `as string` casts on microcopy leaf reads in aiChatDrawer or useAgent.
tasks.verify:
## Automated
- `CI=true npm test -- --watchAll=false --runInBand src/constants/microcopy src/components/aiChatDrawer src/utils/hooks/useAgent`
- `npm run eslint -- --max-warnings 0` on touched files
- `npx tsc --noEmit`

tasks.name: verify-microcopy-string-helper
tasks.brief: Re-run verify recipe; grep aiChatDrawer and useAgent for `microcopy.* as string`.

tasks.name: fix-use-agent-chat-resume-errors
tasks.scopedGoal: Surface mutation resume failures in useAgentChat instead of silent catch.
tasks.brief:
Read audit id agent-chat-resume-silent.

In `src/utils/hooks/useAgentChat.ts`, replace `void agent.resume({ accepted }).catch(() => { proposalClearAfterResumeRef.current = null })` with error handling that sets the hook's error state (or reuses `agent.error` / local `setError`) and clears the proposal ref only on success. Add test in `useAgentChat.test.tsx` proving a rejected resume leaves user-visible error and does not clear proposal prematurely.

Preserve dual useAi/useAgent mount and existing dismiss/reset semantics.

tasks.name: extract-use-agent-thread-id
tasks.scopedGoal: Extract generateThreadId and TTFT_SLO_MS from useAgent.ts.
tasks.brief: Move `generateThreadId` and `TTFT_SLO_MS` from `useAgent.ts` into `src/utils/hooks/useAgentThreadId.ts`. Re-export from `useAgent.ts` if tests import them. Add unit test for generateThreadId format (prefix `t_`). No behavior change.
acceptance: useAgentThreadId.ts owns thread id + TTFT constant.
tasks.verify:
## Automated
- `CI=true npm test -- --watchAll=false --runInBand src/utils/hooks/useAgent src/utils/hooks/useAgentThreadId`
- `npx tsc --noEmit`

tasks.name: extract-ai-chat-tool-display
tasks.scopedGoal: Extract tool-display helpers and message-bubble styled components from aiChatDrawer.
tasks.brief:
From `src/components/aiChatDrawer/index.tsx`, move to co-located files (no behavior change):
- `TOOL_VERB`, `humanizeTool`, `summarizeToolBody`, `CITATION_INLINE_LIMIT`, budget threshold constants → `aiChatToolDisplay.ts`
- Styled primitives `MessageRow`, `MessageBubble`, `StreamingCursor`, `AssistantAttribution`, `AssistantDisclaimer`, `ToolPayloadPanel` → `aiChatDrawerStyles.ts` (or keep with display module if cleaner)

`index.tsx` imports and re-exports as needed. Run `src/components/aiChatDrawer/index.test.tsx` and `src/__tests__/aiAccessibility.strict.test.tsx` if feasible within pathsAllowed — add `src/__tests__/aiAccessibility.strict.test.tsx` to pathsAllowed only if required for green CI.
acceptance: index.tsx line count drops by at least 150 lines.

tasks.name: extract-ai-chat-composer
tasks.scopedGoal: Extract prompt composer footer from aiChatDrawer to AiChatComposer.tsx.
tasks.brief:
After tool-display extraction lands, move the drawer footer (TextArea, send/stop buttons, character-count hint ~lines 2196-2251) into `src/components/aiChatDrawer/AiChatComposer.tsx` with typed props: `input`, `setInput`, `isLoading`, `onSend`, `onAbort`, `promptCharHintText`, `promptCharHintWarning`, `health gating`, refs.

Wire from `AiChatDrawerInner`. Preserve all aria-labels and data-testid `chat-prompt-char-hint`. Tests must pass.
acceptance: AiChatComposer.tsx exists and index.tsx uses it.

tasks.name: fix-sw-registration-logging
tasks.scopedGoal: Log service-worker registration failures in development.
tasks.brief: In `src/index.tsx`, replace `.catch(() => {})` on `navigator.serviceWorker.register` with dev-only `console.warn` (match existing observability warn pattern). Production stays silent. Add/update `index.test.tsx` if needed.
acceptance: Dev warns on SW failure; prod unchanged.

tasks.name: be-fe-tool-name-constants
tasks.scopedGoal: Centralize FE tool name string literals in backend catalog.
tasks.brief: Add `app/tools/fe_tool_names.py` (or constants block in fe_tool_schemas.py) with constants for `fe.boardSnapshot`, `fe.similarTasks`, `fe.searchCandidates`, `fe.applyMutation`, `fe.viewerContext`, etc. Replace literals in `catalog/_shared.py` interrupt helpers and catalog metadata `tools=` tuples where mechanical. Run `python -m pytest tests/test_tools.py tests/test_search_agent_v21.py -q`.
tasks.verify:
## Automated
- `cd backend && python -m pytest tests/test_tools.py tests/test_search_agent_v21.py -q`
- `cd backend && ruff check app/tools/ app/agents/catalog/_shared.py`

tasks.name: be-board-brief-extract-counts
tasks.brief: In `board_brief.py`, extract `_column_task_counts(columns, tasks) -> list[dict]` (or similar) from `_compute_board_brief`; call it from the main function. Add/extend unit test in `tests/test_board_brief.py` or existing board brief tests. Behavior byte-identical.
tasks.verify:
## Automated
- `cd backend && python -m pytest tests/test_board_brief.py -q`
- `cd backend && ruff check app/agents/catalog/board_brief.py`

tasks.name: merge-code-smell-sweep-2
tasks.scopedGoal: Merge all round-2 workers into orch/code-smell-sweep-2-9be8/merge-code-smell-sweep-2; full verification; no PR.
tasks.brief:
Merge order:
1. extract-use-agent-thread-id
2. microcopy-string-helper
3. fix-use-agent-chat-resume-errors
4. extract-ai-chat-tool-display
5. extract-ai-chat-composer
6. fix-sw-registration-logging
7. be-fe-tool-name-constants
8. be-board-brief-extract-counts

Conflict policy: union changes; for aiChatDrawer prefer later extraction branches; for useAgent prefer thread-id + microcopy branches.

Run: tsc, eslint, full Jest, vite build, `cd backend && python -m pytest -q`.
tasks.verify:
## Automated
- `npx tsc --noEmit && npm run eslint -- --max-warnings 0 && CI=true npm test -- --watchAll=false --runInBand && npx vite build`
- `cd backend && python -m pytest -q`
